name: jni-ts-template
description: Template to start with a fresh TypeScript project (Node 26, TS 6, pnpm).

scripts.test: rm -rf ./dist && tsc -b && eslint . && TZ=UTC LOG_SETUP=prod mocha dist/test-core/**/*.js --recursive --exit
scripts.test:integration: rm -rf ./dist && tsc -b && eslint . && TZ=UTC LOG_SETUP=prod mocha dist/test-core/**/*.js --recursive --exit && TZ=UTC LOG_SETUP=prod mocha --timeout 20000 dist/test-integration/**/*.js --recursive --exit
scripts.docker:build-push: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t registry.mopore.org/jni/$(jq -r .name package.json):v$(jq -r .version package.json) -t registry.mopore.org/jni/$(jq -r .name package.json):latest --push .

author: jni@mopore.org
